scripts.clean:deps: find . -type d -name node_modules -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.list:deps: pnpm ls -r --parseable | awk -F'/node_modules/.pnpm/' '/\/node_modules\/\.pnpm\// { split($2, a, "/node_modules/"); pkgver = a[1]; pkg = a[2]; enc = pkg; gsub(/\//, "+", enc); sub(/_.*/, "", pkgver); sub("^" enc "@", "", pkgver); print pkg "@" pkgver; }' | sort -u
